title: violaceae
intro: The Violaaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a group of plants that are closely related and share similar characteristics, such as the presence of heart-shaped leaves and small, delicate flowers. Members of the Violaaceae family, often referred to as pansy or violet family, are typically perennial herbs that thrive in a variety of environments. The Violaaceae family comprises around 200-250 species, including violas, pansies, and violets.
